Narrow fixes covered KR resident-number shorthand/KR-BRN anchors, checksum-valid RRN/business-registration positives, negated no-executed-term-sheet wording, and public/stale percentage prose. The generated must-not label for “Ms. Hana Park” was rejected because the text is an actual named-person reference.
